review_text:
Fantastic  holiday park, situated right next to the Hopkins River fishing, boating and lovely walks.
Facilities at the park are first rate,  indoor pool, outdoor pool,rec centre, tennis court and jumping pillow.
Park is kept immaculate at all times,  great kiosk and staff ate super friendly,  and helpful.
Definitely worth a visit.
Very clean,  well layed out park. Heaps of facilities...too many to mention. Staff very friendly and helpful.  Will Def be back.
Adam and team  were amazing.  Above service when we had a power failure.  It was no trouble to come and try fix and we were made to feel so at ease.  Definatly one park to return to.
A good all round spot

I had the pleasure of staying here over the long Easter weekend. The crew catered for all the children of different age groups providing fun activities and Easter egg hunts and live music. Thank you for the memories my children won’t forget.

First up. The park itself is well maintained, green grass for your site. They put on things for the kids which is great had free music one night which was aslo great. Now the bad stuff.  Their amenities are disgusting. After the toilet had apparently just been cleaned i went in.  Still poo on the bottom of the toilet after it had been cleaned????  Toilet brush was laying on the ground behind the toilet after it had apparently been cleaned.  Then when you flush only the half flush button works which means you have to wait for it to fill to flush again.  The toilet buttons dont get wiped and there were finger prints all over them,  again this is after it had been cleaned. Next day i go to use the toilets and  they were closed for cleaning so i went into the family toilet. It had poo on the seat so i left. Came back half an hour later used the main toilet. On the way out checked the family toilet and it still had poo on the seat.  This is after they supposedly cleaned the toikets. My daughter in law went in after they were cleaned and there were dead insects under the seat. Obviously not cleaned.  You need to lift your gane. This is a health and safety issue
WiFi was not working even after I went to receptionist the other things were nice and clean
Nice park out of warrnambool flat sites just had a look for future trip
Have a van so don't know about rooms
Good experiences snd comfortable
Out of town around 5k but so peaceful

It definitely isn't the same feel as it was a few years ago
The staff or some of the staff that were in the office weren't very polite or even nice in fact
And going into the swimming pool area there's two garden beds to each side that are full with cat poo and some cigarette butts which was lovely to see, the Chairs  in the pool area are all rusted out and need to be replaced and a little bit of TLC in the pool area is needed
Last time I was there they had Filipino girls there cleaning and they were just spotless girls You can see they took great pride in their cleaning and they were really friendly which made it a enjoyable time
The disabled toilet area wasn't very clean they had no hooks to hang anything over so I had to sit them on the windowsill
When someone comes to the office they really would like to feel welcomed they've paid good money to at least feel like you're welcomed
One really good positive note was that the grounds were lovely they were cut lovely the trees were cut back lovely It looked really well cared for
I would have sent an email about this but I don't think I would have got a nice response and I feel like I might have been treated differently when I come next time
As I still like to come back
I hope you can take this as a positive and not a negative
It's something to think about and better your caravan park for others

Very well maintained gardens, pleasant helpful staff, beautiful river area to walk the dog.
Both indoor and outdoor pools not clean. Outdoor pool had lots of old debris visible in filters and floating and rotting on floor of pool.
Indoor heated pool was a bad colour and smelt unpleasant. .....a health issue?
Lovely, big grassed sites with a large   ( fake) grass pad for under awning area. Facilities were so clean. So quiet and relaxing. Thoroughly recommend.

We just love this caravan park!
We always return because the area is so pretty and peaceful, the amenities and facilities are clean and well maintained and the staff are lovely especially Ash at reception.
She makes our stay worth it because she is so hospitable, friendly and knowledgeable!
You won’t be disappointed.
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Great family friendly park. We stay annually around Australia Day for the Sprintcar Classic. Away from the hustle and bustle of the surfside parks in town, close to the river for those that like to throw in a line. The kiosk even sells bait.
Tennis court, mini gulf, jumping pillow, games room, indoor and outdoor pool provide plenty to do for the kids and kids at heart.
Only 10 mins into town and 5 mins from the speedway.

A fantastic, family friendly holiday park. Plenty of opportunities to entertain the grandkids whether it be searching for coloured rocks, playing mini golf,  jumping on the inflated pillow, swimming in the pools to name but a few. Visiting food vans saved Gran cooking too! Staff are very friendly and ammenities spotless.

Brilliant park for a family holiday - love the 2 pools, play ground & mini golf for entertaining the grand kids and even our furry family camped in style.
Love our time thank you
We had a fabulous time at NRMA Warrnambool. Beautiful cabin, amazing play area for kids and cold and heated pools to enjoy.
an all-round good place to stay

I stayed in a standard site but was upgraded to one with an en suite (which i would definitely pay the extra $10 for!!)
The kitchen was huge and well equipped and the location was good - 7ish minutes from warrnambool gateway plaza, and a good stop on the great ocean road.
Chelsea at reception was so lovely too - overall one of the best sites ive stayed at so far. ALSO THERE WAS A CAT

Enjoyed our stay here, and will tell all my freinds about this park. Was the most beautiful and cleanest park I've seen in quite a while, loved the personal ensuites. Staff are very welcoming and friendly will definitely return in the future. 10/10.

Could not be happier. Reception staff incredibly friendly and welcoming. Beautiful park with respectful occupants. The sites are spacious with lots of well tendered lawns. All facilities spotless. Located on the edge of the Hopkins River where there are beautiful walks and fishing. Well done. I can’t recommend this park highly enough.
Thank you

Another excellent NRMA park.

We were welcomed by very warm and helpful reception staff and were upgraded to an ensuite site. The park is beautifully laid out and has an amazing indoor pool and recreation area (both in and outdoors) to suit everyone.

The ensuite was immaculately clean and well presented. The park is a comfortable 10 mins from town.

We enjoyed a walk by the river and later went into town to immerse ourselves in the deep blue pool springs (a real must)  and enjoyed a dinner and drinks at the Pavilion Cafe and Bar
Really friendly staff and lovely place to stay.

We recently stayed at the NRMA Warrnambool Riverside park for 5 nights (we had a tent FYI - powered site).

Our stay was relatively pleasant, however we had the unfortunate incident where a group of  'new Australian' families (6 in total) were there at the same time and had no respect or consideration for guests from noise in the evenings/mornings to spreading themselves all over and around the communal kitchen and taking up all the fridge room!  It was quite sad tbh, they were there for at least 2 to 3 hours in the morning and evenings cooking their foods that have strong odors.   In the end I had some choice words with one of the guys as this happened on 3 occasions I and we tried to 1) cook and 2 wash our dishes.  I believe the park management need to have a sign-up to drum home to certain people to be mindful and respectful of others when using the communal facilities around cooking/washing etc.

Fridge space was a little scarce 2 small fridges for such a large camp site but we made do.

Amenities all good, very clean park and has been mentioned on here the location is 10kms out of town itself.

Adam and Hayden were lovely from the park and we had a pleasant time.

Look this Caravan Park is beautiful. Although a bit off the beaten track, but quiet, well maintained and staff are well pretty good.

My only 2 little gripes.

1. There is not enough recycle bins around the place, particularly for bottles and cans, mostly just RED bins that go straight to landfill. They should double up on the bins and next to every Red Bin put a recyclable bin right next to it. I see it in all the other NRMA parks so why not here?

2. My second grip is, I have stayed at at least 20 NRMA Parks within the last 12 months. Every single Park sends you a SMS the night before saying would you like to extend your stay, typically at a discounted rate (around $10 off). I went to extend my stay by 1 day this morning and even got charged 10% more ! I questioned the SMS and the lady concerned said, and I quote " Well we are so busy we just do not care - We have 108 bookings for the weekend"

Well not very good business guys.

You may have 108 for the weekend but today 29/10/2025, the park is nearly empty. Lucky if 20 people would be here (apart from full timers).

Just think that is a really poor attitude and attitude by certain staff members and procedures should be addressed by management.

Love this caravan park, we have visited multiple times.
Always kept clean.
Kids love the variety of pools and the mini golf course keeps them entertained for hours

AMAZING!! Everyone was so clean and quiet, loveliest neighbors and so much space in our site that we were parked at. It was by a river, had a swimming pool and a mini golf course. A very luxury camp ground for $55 for one night

We camped here recently on our way through on the GOR. Fantastic park. Green grass on every site. Very kid friendly with the indoor and outdoor pool and impressive games room. The park feels safe and secure just that little bit out of town (11mins). Lovely bathrooms - with an impressive 'floor mat provided' feature! Something id not seen before! Definitely recommend if you're coming through.
The beds weren't made and had dirt everywhere. The cups had weren't washed and had a red stain. The only good thing is that his place is next to a river. Also this place if 5 minutes out of town.

The experience was lovely being along Hopkins River. The staff were great but the location was a bit out of town so in an emergency we needed to get a delivery from town & no one did deliveries to the location.

The room would have been good had it been clean. The oven and bbq were full of grease and fat and not been cleaned.

The master bedroom was not vacuumed.

The indoor pool was very dated and dirty. With dark scum lines around the edge of the water line. The spa was boarded up.

I paid $600 for the 2 nights.

The park is quite a bit out of town. Surrounded by farm paddocks.

Kids had a good time though.

Definitely won't be coming back.
Lovely place, friendly staff and holiday makers

Stay for month every year. Park is spotless,  sites are green, level & on the big side. Camp kitchen is clean as are bbqs. All the staff offer a "good morning", smile or wave to you & the managers are lovely. Highly recommend.
20/092025
Adding to my review from a year ago. I would very much like to thank Adam this year for his understanding. I had to cancel a month long stay because of my husbands cancer & there was no questions asked re refund of deposit. At a very hard time, his sensitivity was so welcomed. I wish the park a very prosperous summer & to Adam, you're doing such a wonderful job. Thank you.
We had a fantastic stay very clean and maintained beautifully staff were amazing. Nothing was a problem. Big sites beautiful pools wish we had stayed longer.

Amazing holiday experience! Can not recommend highly enough. Rooms were amazing (river view family cabin), site facilities were amazing (a little sad no spa but pools were A+), staff were so helpful & friendly. Not to mention the fishing & local attractions were well worth the travel.

Hoping to make this a yearly visit!
Amazing
The best maintained park we have visited so far on this trip. Lawns and gardens well trimmed and presented, amenities modern and clean, and the staff were very friendly. Would definitely recommend.
Really nice clean park with plenty for the kids to do. Well priced cabins.

Beautiful park with lovely staff and well-maintained facilities. The accommodation was clean and comfortable, and it’s great that it’s dog-friendly. Our kids had an amazing time – highly recommend for families!
Very nice place. Espacially for families with kids. Close to the river and an amazing mini golf course.

So welcoming and helpful upon arrival. We were kindly upgraded. Lovely park lots of great facilities heated pool a winner, through winter months. Lovely walk down to the river, extremely pretty and serene. Cabin has everything you need for a pleasant stay, hygiene products, coffee/tea sachets, towels provided.Comfortable bed. Definitely recommend, reasonable rates.
We will be back.
Thank you so much for our lovely stay.😊

Great little place but miles from anywhere.
The rooms were good, everything we needed.
Absolutely brilliant park!  The facilities are great whether you have kids or not.  They seem to cater to all price-points with their range of accommodation.  Will definitely be staying here again.

Room had leftover rubbish under the bed, including a cotton bud, chocolate wrapper and cosmetics. Plenty of dust throughout and on ceiling cob webs and on the the couch pillow had lots of stains.

Fiona at the front provided excellent customer service though and listened to my feedback

We took the key before reception closed and returned later this evening. We trusted that the room would be fine and upon inspecting at 8pm,  there was no one at the reception to talk to about it
Well maintained facilities. Friendly staff.

The new Manager and team has brought this beautiful park back to life.
Friendly service, clean and plenty to do for the kids.
A real credit to the new team. We will definitely be back again.

Our Family of 4 needed to refill our water tanks on our van & reception said no problem at all! They didn’t charge us & even got out a hose so we didn’t have to lug ours out. The service was amazing & the grounds are stunning! Definitely staying here next time. Please support the hard working team at this beautiful venue!
Great place..close to everything you need but just far away enough that you don't get sucked into the chaos
Very good for kids , clean. Neat.
Great management

Love this park we have been a few times now stayed in cabins which are lovely neat and clean and have stayed in our caravan and it's a lovely spot clean and tidy lovely walk to river cheers we will be back

We stayed here over the weekend  18th -20th July 2025. I have to say this place would have to be the cleanest holiday park we have stayed at. We stayed in the one bedroom pet friendly cabin. It was very clean, bed sheets clean. No complains. It also has a little closed up area outside on the side of cabin for your puppy to run around. We had other family member stay in the 2 bedroom family cabin, it was perfect for all of us to hangout in. Service was great people were friendly. Even though it was cold, you could go for a swim in the heated pool. There’s a games room for everyone to enjoy, table tennis and out door tennis court. Would defiantly return. We loved it here. Thank you for having us!

Lovely clean caravan park and amenities.
Friendly staff.
A long way from town, certainly not within walking distance!
I went to do some washing and all three machines had dog bedding and blankets in them. Needless to say I will wait for our next stop to do our washing.

We had a beautiful caravan site at this lovely caravan park. The park is immaculate. Grounds are very well maintained as the ammenities are very clean 👌 as well.  They have a outdoor pool area as well as a indoor heated pool. Games room is huge with alot of games for the younger kids. River is right next to the c'park,  although the boat ramp is very very slippery if you wanted to take your kayak in. Council really needs to give it a good gerni. Jetties there to fish off as well.  Although this c'park is only a 5 minute drive into the town centre, we reckon this is the BEST-CLEANIST PARK in Warrnambool.
We stayed x 1 week and we had plenty to do as far as sightseeing 😎. Went out to the Bowls Club for hubby's birthday- staff there were 10/10. Very friendly people.  Warrnambool is a beautiful town to go visit and stay.
Thank you to the staff who were very welcoming of NRMA Warrnambool Riverside Holiday Park for our lovely stay. ☺️

We stayed here for a night while in town for my kids athletics. However this is a hidden gem! We will be back for real holidays very soon! Manager was so lovely and upgraded us to a family cabin on arrival which was so lovely. Totally unexpected. Great park my kids loved the indoor heated pool

My son politely asked if we could celebrate his 8th birthday here at NRMA Warrnambool Riverside Holiday Park. Having been here twice before, I was excited to rebook and to create more memories in a setting that so quickly felt like a second home.
The staffing team here are beautiful, and I would like to wholeheartedly thank them for the genuine kindness and attentiveness they showed towards my son, even giving him the gift of a glider and football for his birthday! So special!
The Saturday night we were lucky enough to experience entertainment from Matt Sell, and once again the staffing team were so amazing with my son, praising him for dancing in front of everyone, and even joining in with him at times.
It meant so much to me, and so much to my son. In his own words he said, “Mum, I’m a very lucky boy that you booked camping, my 8th birthday was epic.”

My son & I can’t wait to return. It definitely won’t be long in between visits, that’s for sure. The 2.5 hour drive is well worth it.
Thank you again Riverside Team!
Staying here in our caravan. Very quiet at night. There are plenty of activities for kids.
Staff management were rude and not willing to help. Go elsewhere for a friendlier experience.

Sorry to have to say this but our experience was not great. Cups with food left in them so had to soak them before washing. Fridge and smoke alarm going off all night. Couldn’t sleep before an 8 hr drive. Would have been nice to have electric blanket instead of having to get up several times a night to heat water for a water bottle. Yes an experience like no other for sure. Mid May not the best time to come to Victoria

We utilised an ensuite site with our camper. The location of the park is excellent, away from the city itself but close enough to be easily able to shop if need be. The river is beside the park and very easily accessible. The staff were friendly helpful and a pleasure to deal with.

Pool is so warm, will 100% book again.

However some signage of the roads would really help. A big white arrow on the road saying exit this way, and a couple signs saying playground/tennis/games room ect this way would alleviate a lot of stress.

Stayed for 2 nights whilst exploring the area. We knew it was out of town which is what we loved, walking distance to some easy fishing. Playground for kids was safe and well kept, didn’t get to use the indoor heated pool but looked like a nice area for the family. Condition of the mini putt course was not favourable but the kids still loved it.

We had an awesome weekend staying at Jubilee Park. The facilities are fantastic for kids.. and adults! Bathrooms and laundries were both very clean and well maintained. The staff were super friendly and very accommodating with our requests to have sites situated near friends. We live just 5 minutes away but it was a perfect getaway for our small children. We will definitely be back, soon.

Overall, this park is really good. Staff are lovely and super helpful. Great amenities and plenty of activities for kids. You could come here for a week and have plenty to do!! My only complaint is the noise of other campers, there was one group who were nowhere near us, but were obnoxiously loud until about 11pm and a group of young people riding their bikes and being loud. My only constructive feedback would be for the park to do a better job at monitoring noise levels and keeping campers accountable.
Everything is good great attractions to amuse kids the only problem is the size of the rooms other then that wood 100% recommend
Terrible service- would not recommend!

We were looking forward to out easter weekend away with our family until we were delt a devastating blow, re the health of my wife. The news was devastating,  and cancelling meant another family on the waiting list could enjoy the park. When I asked re the deposit, the receptionist was going to get back to me after speaking to management.  No reply. So I called back 24 hours later and got fobbed off. The site has been on sold yet greed from management presides. You get a one star review for your lack of empathy, care and compassion.

Great spot out of town, nice spacious sites and plenty of things for kids to do. Staff very helpful and cheerful, river access great and perfect for families to use. Highly recommended if you dont need to be in town, and it's only a 8 minute drive in anyway!

The cabin was nice and the service was great but their advertising was very misleading. It's about 8 kilometres from town, not close to it. The Riverside is also misleading. The caravan park is across the road from the boat ramp and at least 3 rows of cabins are for long-term residents. We were located at least 400-500 meters from the river view looking at other cabins. There is nothing you can do on the river unless you like fishing and forget about getting a river view cabin. You won't get it. It doesn't exist. Wi-Fi is virtually unusable. It's very slow and unreliable.
My cabin was clean and fully equipped. I enjoyed the balcony with table and chairs. The staff was lovely.
Visiting friends staying there

Great park. Weather had turned sour on our way back to the boat to VDL, so the indoor heated pool was appreciated. The facilities are all good. The dryers are fantastic, and reasonably priced. The staff were excellent. It's a little out of town, but that wasn't a problem.

Picked up our new caravan from local dealer and stayed here for 3 nights to try everything out.

What an excellent park all round. Check in easy and friendly, large sites with wide roads for easy parking. Amenities absolutely spotless and whole park very well maintained.

Quiet surrounds with easy river access. 10 mins drive into town.

Our first visit here but will definately wont be our last. Highlyrecommended!!
What a wonderful park great facilities and well maintained friendly staff, we would highly recommend staying there and just by the river 🙌🏼
We stayed in the budget family cabin and it was great, clean quiet and comfortable. We were there for one night, would've happily stayed for a few more.
Great location... just out of town with all major service shops within a 5 min drive.

We had a lovely time, my kids were so happy because the pool and playground.
The cabine is clean, teady and there is a good kitchen tool it was very helpful.
We are hight recommend MRMA Warrnambool it's good location and greate servies the staf so friendly.
You will not feel boring if you have kids there is a river next so is good for fishing too

We travel full time and always use caravan parks
This park is in our top 10 that we have stayed in
Green grassed large sites, amenities always clean and a first for us, indoor and outdoor pools
While out of town by 4km still handy to town and the Great Ocean Road

Great place to stay with a lot to offer especially for children. We love the food vans each night!!!
Sites were clean and straight forward booking, checking in. But only flaw was being next to a cow paddock there was lots of flys 😕

A great park.very well maintained by Hayden and his crew.Amenities are spotless all the time The heated pool was a great surprise and the playground offered kids  a good variety mini golf, games room, table tennis, outdoor pool and much more. Sites were flat. Staff at reception led by Adam were excellent always happy and helpful.
Well done Adam and Hayden we will see you.next year..
Nice green sites.
A fabulous park, almost resort like. Lovely green grassy sites, swimming pools, mini golf and neat and tidy.

Booked a powered site for two nights to take the grandkids away. Wow what value for money the kids had so much to do. Two swimming pools, jumping pillow, tennis court, games room, mini golf all included in the price of the site. All of the amenities were spotless and has a great camp kitchen and bbq areas. The owners Adam and Hayden were very obliging and friendly as were all the staff. Fiona who took our booking over the phone and was also there when we checked in was very efficient and friendly. This would have to be without a doubt the best caravan park in Warrnambool

We chose this park for the location close to town but not in it. Then found how good it was; lovely service, level sites, two pools one indoors and one outdoor and next door to Jubilee Park on the Hopkins River.
We called as stated on the email and they were condescending about leaving the key but it's standard practice.

A little out of town, but so very worth it.  From the initial call to book  our van site, Fiona was very attentive to our request and helpful with selecting a site for us and when checking in Adam made us feel welcome and we appreciated the suggestions of places to go... Deep blue hot springs was one of those and yep a must to do.  The park is beautifully kept and we even played a round of mini golf, with all the relaxing, walking to see the cows in the field and sightseeing we ran out of time to play tennis or hubby to go fishing... There is always next time 😉. ||Thanks Adam to you and your team for the warm welcome and the professionalism you all show and care with ensuring everyone is there to relax and enjoy their stay.  We will definately be back again soon, maybe next time with our doggies. 😁❤️
Absolutely love this caravan Park friendly staff we will return it's a credit to them all.we absolutely enjoyed our stay.highly recommend.

An excellent park. Large sites for our 8.5 metre van. Small shrubs between most sites. One outdoor pool with waterslide. One indoor pool. Tennis court with free hire. Mini golf with free hire. Amenities super clean. Lovely walk to view the river. Saw one camper with a good sized fish. Staff friendly and helpful. To top off our stay, free entertainment on the Saturday night. So much cheaper than the overpriced parks in town. Highly recommend.

I have spent several months in and around  Warrnambool. I've stayed at every park in and around Warrnambool ... This park wins .. There is so much to do at this place .. . Indoor activities ,outdoor activities.Pools ( yes , pools . One heated indoor , and the more fun , outdoor with water slide . ) .. ya hav the river a short walk away,
It's a short drive into town . But I wouldn't .  due to Warrnambools new pedestrian crossings,you might find driving in town , an absolute nightmare.... I know I hate driving in town , the best way into town I think is , drive upto Sherwood park . Catch the train . Your not going to get asked  for tickets between town and Sherwood park so it will be free , both ways.  . There is at least 5 vline trains everyday , ..

..Bath mats are really handy in the shower block , but be quick , there is only one shower block. .. so when they are being cleaned , the only option is to jump in the pool to wash ... .
Grounds are  clean  ..  big sites... Level and easy to get in & out of ..
Management and staff are friendly & obviously take a lot of pride in maintaining the park the way they do ...
Rates are realistic .. ...
And not being in Warrnambool , you don't have to put up with the theft and things that go on in all the parks in town .....
A1 park ....... In my opinion 😎
Have been coming here for over 21 years. Love everything about this place.🙂👍

Stayed in our tent.
Nice welcome, easy checkin and check out.
Clean toilet and kitchen.
Lots of facilities for kids and family

Honestly the absolute best park I have ever had the pleasure of staying in. This is now our third year in a row and I have just booked a fourth. The management that run the park have always gone above and beyond to ensure our stay was pleasurable. Each year the park gets better it’s super clean the cleaning staff are super friendly and engaging. The amenities are great with an indoor outdoor pool, the ballon bounce and the amazing putt putt green. I can’t recommend this place enough and three years in I still haven’t seen all of Warrnambool because the kids don’t want to leave. I especially want to thank Adam the most engaging park manager I have ever met. See u guys at Easter

Toller Campingplatz mit allem, was das Herz begehrt. Bemerkenswert ist das geräumige Hallenbad. Saubere und modern ausgestattete Waschräume, schöne geräumige Stellplätze auf Rasen. Die City ist nicht fußläufig erreichbar. Gerne wieder.
Poor internet Vodaphone doesn’t work at all. Wifi supply from the NRMA is a joke doesn’t work at all.

Found park to be in an excellent location to relax next to the Hopkins River.
Park grounds are very tidy, but the infrastructure is looking a little worn out.
The cabin (21) we stayed in requires an update. Cook tops are rusty and slow to heat, vanity door hinge not connected, (l repaired and adjusted gaps to vanity doors), cavity door to bathroom off bottom guide, fridge was too small even for 2 people, fly wire on windows are worn out.
Only positive within the cabin was the bed is comfortable and the water was hot with plenty of pressure.
Great experience
Despite of multiple request about noisy/disturbing neighbourhood from the reception, they didn't solve the problem. Very disappointing. I am having headache because of other people enjoying.
Very loud neighbourhood. I called the reception multiple times to warn them to be more considerate but they failed to do so. People in charge did not help enough.
Really clean and comfortable cabin in a nice location (if you have a car). We only stayed for a night but would’ve loved to have stayed longer

Cracking park, as you would expect from an NRMA park.
The good:
Wide streets (handy compared to many for those of us with bigger vans)
Pool with slide, plus indoor heated pool, plus Great Ocean Road themed mini golf and all the usual other kids fun things.
What could improve:
We had one of the renovated ensuite sites, just needs a better shower curtain or change to a door cos the existing one doesn't get the job done.
And finally, expect cats around. Residents say they belong to the park managers, could be feral. For most people it might not be an issue, we are just not a cat family. They seem to linger closer to the front so next time I'll ask for a site up the back.
Definitely one I'll be marking to come back though. Clean, well equipped and well maintained. 👍👍

We had a awesome time here. We stayed 2 weeks and it was a great 2 weeks and we made some great friends. This park has something for everyone from mini golf to the games room, a heated indoor pool and they also had a out door pool, tennis courts and a basketball ring. Staff were excellent and very helpful. They were always there if you needed anything. Rod the handyman and Fiona the receptionist,  I could not fault them. They couldn't  do anymore then they did to make myself and my partner feel more welcome and try to assist us when needed.  The park and facilities were always kept tidy and clean. We will be back when we are this way next. Thank you to the Warrnambool team for making our stay awesome 👌

We loved our time here. Park was clean, spacious sites, great facilities and amazing staff.
Only reason not giving 5 stars is ensuite toilet could have been cleaner but apart from that was amazing!
Would definitely recommend and would return for sure!

Beautiful place. Perfect for families with children park, swimming pool, adults play area etc. location is next to river which was even better. Customer service was great. The room was tidy and most facilities were provided along with the kitchen area. Over all experience positive.
Beautiful. Immaculate.  Hospitality from reception desk is amazing.

Got an upgrade as a NRMA member and a discount.
What more do you want..

Really great park. Staff were friendly and helpful from start to finish. The grounds were so clean. Great sized sites. Amenities were large and clean, having fresh bath available mats is so helpful.
Thanks for a great stay.

I've lived here 18 years,it's a nice place to live although not as good as it once was,started out as a lifestyle village about 20 years ago,it was fantastic back then,but then with new owners and new management it has turned away from the original idea,its become a cheaper housing option for people who can't afford to buy a house in the city, original rules no longer seem to exist, dogs are let bark all day by permanent residents, cars are randomly parked,people use power tools as well as hammering and banging all day,not peaceful anymore 💀

Stunning location, great rooms and service.
Always love having a little holiday!

We loved our stay here at NRMA Warrnambool! We had a three bedroom cabin which was perfect for our family. The cabin was clean and tidy with super comfy beds! |Park facilities were great the kids loved the indoor and outdoor pools plus lots or lawn area and play space for them. Check in and out was simple and one small issue we had was resolved immediately and without any hassle. we will definitely stay again.
Looking a bit tired

A beautiful caravan park. So much to do there for children of all ages and we went  during school holidays. It is our only caravan park to go to in Warrnambool.  Big caravan sites, lots of activities for children. Exceptional friendly reception staff with a wealth of knowledge on "what to do" in Warrnambool.  Just an amazing place!!!
Excellent for a weekend holiday.
Fantastic

NRMA warnambool is the BEST resort we have stayed at by far. I love these resorts all over Australia but this one has absolutely everything.  From the outdoor pool, to the indoor heated pool, air hockey, 8ball, table tennis, mini Golf, tennis, jumping pillow, playground, The river is 2 minute walk out the back gate with  3 mini jetty to fish off and a beautiful walking track along the river for taking dogs for a walk, pet friendly, has dog yards attached to your cabin a a cat run,  bike hires for kids around the park, then warrnambool is just a 5 min drive into town and you have the beautiful beach, massive jetty, awesome beach walking tracks, stunning scenery, the deep blue hot spring, lake pertobes entire area with multiple big playgrounds  spaced put together along the river with mini Golf, ice cream shops, water fountain play stations, boat rides, paddle boat rides, super long flying fox, lots of good shops around. And Rebel on the way out to the resort again. We have stayed her multiple times and will do it again MULTIPLE TIMES. The beat part about it is if the weather is terrible and you cant do anything and ita too cold outside in the pool, the kids can play in the indoor heated pool all day 👌 I highly highly recommend to any family for a nice little get away. Completly affordable too. Can't rate it high enough honestly 🙌 book it! Just for a weekend. Check it out. You'll love it and be back for longer.  Also check out at night time when it's dark go for a walk up near the reception they have a beautiful lit up eating area. It's stunning 😍  I can't remember the name of who checked me into my room but they were exceptional service.  Best service I've ever received. And we go away a lot. So lovely, accommodating, efficient & kind. We got cabins next to our family and it was the most perfect set up.
(Pictured)

Flexible after hours check-in.

Only one amenities building with showers that were being cleaned from 8.45 am to 10.00 am which made it unable to shower before the 10.00 am check out.

In conclusion we paid $51 (2p) for a powered spot where we couldn’t shower in the morning.

Fantastic park
Great staff
Superb facilities
Love the mini golf
Thanks so much for the free upgrade to an ensuite site

Love this place! We arrived late afternoon, was upgraded to a beautiful family cabin on the river. The cabin was so clean, modern and spacious with everything you could need. The amenities are great and kids were excited. Thank you to the lovely staff for making this an enjoyable stay.

Great location , amazing stay. We booked a family cabin and was upgraded to Duluxe Villa , which was fabulous. Great experience, lovely location , clean and quiet place . The river is just a short 2-3mins walk from the cabin across a road . Was a serene place and would come back here .
This is a fantastic park, terrific facilities, very clean amenities. What a great idea bath matts. Definitely put this caravan park in for your holidays.
We took our own van so we had a slab. Staff were friendly and the grounds were fantastic. As we only stayed one night we didn't get to use the pool etc but it looked fantastic we will be back

My husband and i stayed here for 3 nights and it is very quiet park with lots of activities for kids, short walk to river for a fish, we have stayed a few times over the last few months and have noticed the changes that lovely staff are working very hard to make, it just keeps getting better,
we will be back to stay again very soon

NRMA caravan parks are always  excellent. Staff very friendly and parks are very clean.
.

Park is located approximately 2km east of Warrnambool and 1.5km off the highway. Sites are large and well grassed.    Amenities are good and the indoor pool was a bonus. The river at the back of the park makes it a good spot for the angler.
Booking hiccup, otherwise all good

We stayed for 2 nights with 3 other couples and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The owners and staff are very friendly and helpful.
The park is clean and the amenities are good. Nice warm showers and the complimentary bath mats are a nice touch as well!
We’ll be back!
Thank you
Shirley & Ross Marshallsea
露營車宿設施算是在澳洲住過最完善的。周邊風景也很漂亮。大草原。牛群。河邊景色都很棒。值得多住幾天
Was a great place to stay. I was there for four nights. Great amenities a indoor pool entertainment galore. Backs onto the river. Beautiful.

Bins around the park overflowing, bathrooms wiped over every second day, poo on toilet seats and walls. Most of the staff are just utter rude, the old bloke on the buggy was screaming at children and trying to fight adults over Easter (he needs a reality check). Very poor customer service and putrid maintenance & cleaning. Plenty more parks in Warrnambool that would be better.

Tried to bring up our issues in private and was threatened, yelled at and judged for having tattoos. Was also told they’d have us banned from every NRMA.

(We have currently taken further action to all of these issues.)

Very well presented park. We stayed in a powered site which had ample space for our large van with awning. The green area under the awning means a clean site regardless of weather. The amenities are spotless and the indoor and outdoor pools are a bonus. There is a path from the site to the river which is just a minute’s walk. Warrnambool is a short drive away. Nothing negative to write about the site; however, since COVID, we’ve found prices have increased considerably across the board, and for retirees like ourselves, many of the excellent sites in popular destinations are becoming expensive for the retiree budget. It would be great to see seniors’ discounts being offered off-peak times when retirees usually choose to travel. We’ve noted that many are seeking out more basic sites because of cost, which is disappointing as we enjoy staying in sites of this quality.
Quiet beautiful place

We stayed for 4 nights recently and had a great time. My main issue is that the place is a bit of an internet black hole. The shared kitchen space was the only place I got get internet to work. There was WiFi but it only seemed to work for us on the first day of the trip.

The swimming pools were great and the kiosk was very cheap.

The staff were lovely.

The park is quite far from town, but has a bottle shop and some other shops right nearby.

The staff here are awesome! We are so grateful for the kindness the showed us when our toddler had an accident. They fixed him up with bandaids and gave him an icy pole. The facilities were clean and great for the kids. We loved the bath mats in the communal showers. I wish we could have stayed longer.

This was a wonderful location for a family vacation great time spending my day at the nearby lake, unfortunately the room we stayed in (the family cabin-medium) was not cleaned properly. There was bits of food left on the ground as we walked in, plates were dirty, and blankets were smelly and gave us bites on our bodies. 8pm is the latest kids can play in pools and other activities, which is unfortunate for the older kids to explore. There was no service in our room, sos was the only thing we had. No calls could go through as well as messages. My overall experience was amazing outside of town when I had service and things to do, but when I stayed at the room it got boring with the family because everything closed when we arrived back.

Great caravan park, has an indoor and outdoor pool, mini golf, tennis court, playarea and jumping pillow.  Very clean amenities, big sites powered and unpoweted.  Has river access and great walks along the river which has a boat ramp, pontoons and fish cleaning facilities

Fantastic 4 days had at Warrnambool. Adam, Hayden and Doug and the team are all fantastic. We wouldn’t want to be greeted by a more welcoming team. Keep up the good work and we will definitely be back. So glad to have been able to catch up again with you all. It’s nice to have such wonderful friends and people to chat with and spoil with scones and pancakes lol.
You guys are the best crew anyone could hope for xxxx

Great little holiday park, with great facilities. Playground, jumping pillow, games room, indoor pool, outdoor pool, mini golf that they are currently doing up, tennis courts etc. Lots to do for kids.
We stayed in a family cabin.
2 bedroom, Queen size bed in one and bunk with double on bottom & single on top in the other.
Everything great except for the queen bed was way too soft & uncomfortable.

Very neat and lots of green grass.
A dog friendly park.👌👍

What a perfect spot for our family reunion (64 peoples). The kids had lots of activities to do without leaving the beautiful park and the grownups could relax and catchup with others. Thankyou very much Adam for all your assistance over the past 4 months pulling this event together. During the weekend nothing was too much trouble for Adam or Hayden, making sure that we had everything we needed to make our special weekend the resounding success it was.
Great park with all the things for the kids and well maintained. Cheap lolly's and ice creams for the kids.

Was a great few days at this park with our little toy poodle. Ensuite powered site was spacious n clean . Facilities were all clean.  Loads to do in the area, beaches were great. We had perfect weather which made everything look perfect!  Will go back again soon .
Very friendly staff and helpful

This place is very unhygienic. We fell ill staying here. The sinks were full of black mould. The floors were not cleaned or swept. The beds were not made, we had to do it ourselves. The blankets were not washed and were dirty. There were holes in the cabin walls.
Nice place to stay. Plenty for everyone to do. Putt putt a little worn but adds to the fun.  Peaceful place away from noise
Great cabin we stayed, bbq on the balcony was the best!!!! Friendly people staying there

This park was the most welcoming in our 6 week journey. Adam and Hayden were the best hosts. Watching the children in the park was a joy. Truly family friendly and seriously wish I'd found a coloured rock for the free slushie! We had a wonderful time. I would highly recommend this park. Adam was so helpful and despite only being in the area for a short time was knowledgeable about the local area - we were guided to all the local bottle shops. Great park, great hosts, great location. Highly recommended.
Great place.  Dog friendly, there is an indoor and outdoor pool, short walk to the river, games room with a tv , camp kitchen with tv.  Really clean and nice amenities across the board

First time.we.have ever stayed here and what a wonderful experience. Adam, Hayden,Sandy, Doug as.well as all satff were.all so friendly and went above.and.beyond. A special mention to three of the cleaning girls.who all went.out.of their way to say hello with a smile.

Our 9th annual trip to this park. We enjoyed all the facilities, the tennis courts, both pools, jumping pillow (with it's new shade sails) the grandkids safely road scooters and bikes around. We played cricket after dinner. Our Jack Russell dog very welcome. There was a positive difference this year-it was Adam and Hayden the new managers. They were professional, thoughtful, nothing seemed a problem and have made many positive changes in the park. It is definitely cleaner, the grounds look great and there is future plans to move forward. There were a number of kids activities and food vans during the week. However, they are not afraid to tackle any issues eg. kids not following rules in the pool will be spoken to 👏 Everyone l spoke to felt the same positive vibe.
I thoroughly recommend anyone to come and stay awhile at Hopkins Rv NRMA Warnambool.

We had a great stay at this park,was a last minute booking and we got a spacious enquire site. Staff were very friendly and the facilities are excellent would recommend this park, especially families as lots to do for the kids.

We stayed for the second year over New Years Eve. Staff are lovely - nothing is too much trouble. Park facilities and location are great. Only negative is that the cabins are getting very tired, definitely time for a bit of money to be spent on a refresh. However compared to many other parks at this time of year the cabins are relatively cheap so I guess like most things in life you get what you pay for. All of this said we enjoyed our stay and would stay again.

We have stayed in so many places over the last 12 years and this park is by far one of the best. Why? Because of the new management  Adam,  Hayden and their two older sidekicks. They are such nice people who love their job and they have so many dreams of making this place even better.
With a jumping pilllow, playground, face painting, animal show, food vans, finding rock game, arts and craft, heated indoor AND outdoor pool, mini golf, games room AND a river for the kids to fish at every night my children had the time of their lives. One even shared her birthday with Adam while there.
And on top of that we could take our puppy with us who had the time of his life.
They also have the bathrooms so clean with 4 cleanings a day.
We loved it so much we are coming back for Easter.
Highly recommend.

Can I just point out to those who giving poor reviews. As a resident here for coming up to six years, pleasing everyone is hard. The last 3 years has been terrible for us and visitors due the poor management of the park. It has been neglected and uninvited. These new guys in the short time they have been here have turned it around massively. Feedback received is always acted on and I can see this place being the next best in Australia. They both have the right attitude and most of all they CARE. Hospitality is a tough gig and doesn't need abuse. Well done Adam and Hayden and can at least be proud to show people where I live. 😀

Great park- Staff and management most obliging .
- will definitely book again. We enjoyed our stay 🥰

New management has no idea what they are doing. Dirty cabins and staff smoking while working and throwing their cigarette butts on grasses.
The indoor swimming pool has no direct access to the toilets and showers which makes it non compliant

The worst experience ever. We drove 4 hours to get here to find out they messed up our booking and telling us they didn't take over  property from the previous management.  In middle of conversation, one of the staff threatened us to leave or they call the police.I would highly suggest looking at somewhere else to stay as this place is hopeless and have no idea what they are doing.

Great park management are so helpful cleanest toilet blocks constantly being cleaned . Pol areas are beautifully keep we have already booked for next year. Love the communication and activities for the families for such a busy park the night time noise leavel is great.

Good place for kids to play, swim, and bike. However, expensive at $320 per night for a small cabin, and we could go on a cruise at that price. Our friend got the similar cabin for only $200 for the same period at the same place.
WIFI in cabins and phones didn't work well . Overall, not happy with our six-night stay.

My partner and myself stayed here 2 nights. We realised the fridge wasn’t working in cabin it was resolved in a matter of minutes the 2 gentleman that attended absolutely amazing and loved how they stayed and had a chat and laugh! The internet wasn’t the best and we were so happy with that to be disconnected away with the world to enjoy one another’s company! The cabins were clean and the bed felt like sleeping on a cloud! The woman at the desk was so amazing when we checked in we felt very welcome. We would 100% recommend a stay here can’t wait to be back! If I could give 10 stars I would!!

We loved this caravan park! 5 night stay and we would happily come back for more. Friendly, beautiful sites with plenty of room and a really nice vibe. Managers we're lovely and our Christmas was made extra special with a visit from Santa & his elf!
Waren für eine Nacht dort mit unserem Camper und haben gratis ein Update auf "ensuite" bekommen. Das war wirklich sehr nice. Die Anlage ist insgesamt gepflegt und das Personal sehr freundlich.

Beautiful spot but transport needed for shops and Warrnambool itself
Great staff

Stayed at NRMA Riverside a few times now. Good location out of town (much quieter) near the Hopkins River with boat ramp access at adjacent Jubilee Park. Nice sites and facilities with dog friendly cabins and ensuite sites available (check conditions prior). New park owners also seem keen to make improvements. Well worth a visit.

Cabin really needs attention shower base flooded. sink is water damaged.handle as you enter exit cabin was in poor state or repair too be honest a little disappointing NRMA normally have high standards this cabin is sincerely lacking
Great park. Clean and well maintained. Indoor heated pool a treat.
Awesome staff

Booked a powered site (28) over the Melbourne Cup weekend 4-8 November 2023. The park was pretty full but it never felt full. Everyone was respectfull and considerate, particularly at night when it was silent from 9pm.
The sites are very well maintained and level with small trees/shrubs between sites.  We had plenty of room for our camper trailer, 4x4 and gazebo.   The park boasts an indoor and outdoor pool. The kids were well looked after with a well appointed recreation area.
The park is dog friendly and there were lots around. None were an issue, and we had no problems with barking etc.
The park is on the Hopkins River and has jetties and a really good boat ramp.
There is a great shopping centre nearby along with. Bunnings, JB Hi, BCF and lots of other large stores.
We are really enjoying our stay here and will definitely be back with our adult kids.
Thoroughly recommended if you're looking for a quiet caravan park but close to everything Warrnambool has to offer.
Although a little way out of town, this park was so quiet and peaceful,with swimming, jumping pillow, games room and mini golf, kids will not be bored! Thanks guys and girls.

We stayed at family cabin for 1 night. It had everything we needed. Cabin is clean and specious. Staffs are very friendly and helpful. There are some common area and facilities here though we didn't have time to explore them. Few minutes drive to town, the location is good considering its price. The only thing we are not happy with is the WIFI. WIFI connection is pretty poor and mobile signal is not good either.
Great park. Heated pool. Good staff

I’m really 50/50 on our stay. Some good parts and not so good parts. The park facilities are great, really great. Outside waterpark, indoor pool, tennis courts, jumping pillow, room for kids to ride bikes and scooters. The kids were busy the whole time. The cabin on the other was only ok. Some things could have done with a good clean, the fan and aircon needed a really good once over. The walls had marks all over them and holes. One of the bedroom sliding doors didn’t work either. The bathroom was so so small, I know there isn’t anything you can do about this but thought I’d just make mention.
Awesome family caravan park. Great for pets as well

Beautiful place to stay, nice spacious areas, we had a pet friendly cabin, most the cabins are fenced off and have a little fenced off run for the pooches beside the cabins, nice little walking area at the back by the river, not far to the beach / into the town. Great accomodating staff, will definitely be staying here again for longer. Child friendly, play ground / pool area with tennis courts. Overall great stay. Adam was cheerful and lovely on our check out, all staff were amazing. Thanks again!

Great family friendly facilities with indoor pool, mini golf and tennis court n free equipment to use. Good shower pressure, clean sheets but blankets in cabin needed a wash. Downside is it’s 15 minutes drive from downtown Warrnambool and theres no recycling. Shame on the NRMA. They have an EV charger but send your bottles n cans to landfill. Council should make recycling mandatory for caravan parks to operate.

Absolutely terrible, the staff are some of the rudest, most confrontational people we have ever encountered, the guy whom claims to be head of cleaning or whatever is the rudest most despicable excuse  for a human being I've ever seen and I don't  recommend going here .
What a great spot, can fish on the hopkins River just out the back gate. Indoor heated pool , outside pool great for all ages

The only down side is having kids games that take money but can't withdraw money on site (edited)  as my daughter came to the office and asked to withdraw money as she wanted to treat her sister to the arcade games and chocolate from the vending machine and was told the office doesn't have the means to withdraw money that seemed odd so when we went for dinner I got change for them from the servo

Stayed a few days in an ensuite powered site with our large motorhome.Beautiful clean and tidy park. Quiet when we stayed (Sunday to Wednesday), and far enough from traffic to feel you are truly relaxing. Fantastic customer service and Michelle and Linda (management) were very friendly and professional. We will be back.
Absolutely amazing service, staff are incredibly helpful, even kindly upgraded us, very clean facilities and beautiful scenery. 10/10
Fantastic place.

The owner was amazing and very nice.
perfect amenities
includes indoor and outdoor pool, tennis court, basketball court and childrens' playground.
Rooms were warm and comforting.
I didn't expect to have WiFi so far out in country, yet there was usable WiFi.

We stayed in a two bedroom cabin the sofa was dirty & not useable , carpet need replacing as dirty,  floor Lino was broken. Certainly didn’t feel comfortable staying there two nights  having being told it’s an upgraded cabin & not standard we were disappointed. Pictures  on line are misleading too. Staff at the office are courteous & excellent. Cabins need to be refurbished.
An excellent meal, and great friendly staff
Excellent NRMAv

Great park, easy access for the van, facilities were well kept. Being out of town and winter, the park was quiet and we basically had the indoor heated pool to ourselves.
Staff were wonderful and friendly, organizing a site without a booking.
